channel.title: Copley Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Copley Family History

item.title: Visual Story Atlas
item.description: Diagram-first guide to the Copley family story, evidence status, settlement network, and active research quests.

item.title: Dolan Family
item.description: Dolan Family The Dolan family is part of the Lewis County Catholic settlement network and the maternal line for John Copley’s children through Mary Ellen Dolan Copley.

item.title: Roger Copley
item.description: Roger Copley of Roughley (1430–1490) Biographical Profile Born: 1430 Died: 1490 Location: Roughley (also Roughey), Surrey, England Title: Esquire Significance: Son of Sir Richard Copley; father of William Copley who established the Bredon Copley line; established Copley seat at Roughley, Surrey Fami...
